module.name: Espionage
module.description: Training modules covering the art of intelligence gathering, deception, and covert operations.

espionage_clandestine_surveillance.name: Clandestine Surveillance
espionage_clandestine_surveillance.description: Covert surveillance training for tracking and intelligence gathering without detection.

espionage_counterintelligence.name: Counterintelligence
espionage_counterintelligence.description: Training on identifying, neutralizing, and counteracting enemy intelligence operations.

espionage_covert_operations.name: Covert Operations
espionage_covert_operations.description: Training in executing undercover missions, infiltration, and sabotage tactics.

espionage_disguise_and_identity.name: Disguise and Identity
espionage_disguise_and_identity.description: Training in adopting false identities, physical disguises, and legend-building.

espionage_psychological_manipulation.name: Psychological Manipulation
espionage_psychological_manipulation.description: Techniques for influencing and controlling human behavior in intelligence operations.

espionage_tradecraft.name: Tradecraft
espionage_tradecraft.description: Espionage skills training including cryptography, surveillance evasion, and intelligence gathering.

espionage_clandestine_surveillance_shado.name: Shadowing Techniques
espionage_clandestine_surveillance_shado.description: Advanced foot surveillance techniques to track targets discreetly in various environments.

cards.title: Single-Agent Shadowing
cards.description: Following a target alone while maintaining anonymity and avoiding detection.
bulletpoints: Use environmental cover for seamless movement
Adjust pace to match the target’s movements
Employ counter-surveillance tactics to detect suspicion
cards.summaryText: Track alone by blending with surroundings, matching pace, and spotting counter-surveillance cues.

cards.title: Team-Based Surveillance
cards.description: Coordinating multiple agents to track a subject while minimizing exposure.
bulletpoints: Rotate observers to prevent recognition
Communicate non-verbally to coordinate movements
Use relay points and choke points for optimal coverage
cards.summaryText: Coordinate rotating handlers with silent signals and planned relay positions for seamless coverage.

espionage_clandestine_surveillance_signa.name: Signal Interception
espionage_clandestine_surveillance_signa.description: Techniques for monitoring electronic communications and gathering intelligence from digital sources.

cards.title: Cell Phone Interception & Tracking
cards.description: Using advanced techniques to monitor and track mobile communications.
bulletpoints: Deploy IMSI catchers for call interception
Analyze metadata for geolocation tracking
Decrypt encrypted communications using AI models
cards.summaryText: Intercept mobile traffic via IMSI tools, metadata analysis, and targeted decryption workflows.

cards.title: Wiretap Methods & Digital Monitoring
cards.description: Legally and covertly placing wiretaps on targets under surveillance.
bulletpoints: Use fiber optic taps for real-time data access
Employ passive and active wiretaps for different use cases
Manage encryption protocols to bypass security layers
cards.summaryText: Select suitable wiretap hardware, deployment mode, and crypto handling for seamless monitoring.

espionage_clandestine_surveillance_vehic.name: Vehicle Tailing
espionage_clandestine_surveillance_vehic.description: Methods for tracking a target by car while avoiding counter-surveillance detection.

cards.title: Covert Following & Route Analysis
cards.description: Tail a target’s vehicle while maintaining proper distance and avoiding detection.
bulletpoints: Use three-car rule for minimizing suspicion
Vary routes and speeds to match traffic flow
Anticipate sudden turns and stops to maintain coverage
cards.summaryText: Maintain discreet spacing, mirror traffic patterns, and anticipate maneuvers to stay on target.

cards.title: Mobile Surveillance Switching
cards.description: Handing off the target between multiple vehicles to avoid counter-surveillance detection.
bulletpoints: Use staggered positions to seamlessly switch cars
Coordinate with aerial and ground support
Deploy decoy vehicles to mislead the target
cards.summaryText: Execute multi-vehicle handoffs with layered support and decoys to defeat countersurveillance.

espionage_counterintelligence_disinforma.name: Disinformation Strategies
espionage_counterintelligence_disinforma.description: Advanced techniques for deploying strategic misinformation to manipulate enemy intelligence operations.

cards.title: Controlled Leaks & Narrative Control
cards.description: Strategic release of falsified intelligence to shape adversary perception.
bulletpoints: Use media manipulation to reinforce misleading narratives
Identify target audiences for selective disinformation
Coordinate with intelligence assets to amplify false leads
cards.summaryText: Seed falsified intel through tailored media channels and asset coordination to steer adversary views.

cards.title: False Flag Operations & Deceptive Intelligence
cards.description: Implementing controlled operations that disguise the true source of intelligence actions.
bulletpoints: Craft plausible narratives to misdirect enemy analysis
Employ cutouts and misattribution techniques
Use proxies to plant evidence and alter investigative trails
cards.summaryText: Design misattributed operations with proxies and cutouts to obscure true sponsorship.

espionage_counterintelligence_double_age.name: Double Agent Management
espionage_counterintelligence_double_age.description: Techniques for handling and controlling double agents to feed misinformation or neutralize threats.

cards.title: Identifying and Vetting Double Agents
cards.description: Assessing the reliability and loyalty of an operative suspected of being a double agent.
bulletpoints: Implement controlled exposure tests to confirm loyalties
Analyze inconsistencies in mission reports
Monitor for unauthorized contacts with hostile intelligence agencies
cards.summaryText: Run controlled exposures, report audits, and contact monitoring to validate double-agent loyalty before deeper deployment.

cards.title: Feeding Misinformation to Double Agents
cards.description: Using controlled leaks and deceptive intelligence to mislead adversaries.
bulletpoints: Strategically release selective data to test information flow
Maintain plausible deniability for exposed operations
Use fabricated scenarios to divert adversarial resources
cards.summaryText: Stage selective leaks with cover stories and fabricated scenarios so adversaries chase false priorities while you trace the leak path.

espionage_counterintelligence_spy_identi.name: Spy Identification
espionage_counterintelligence_spy_identi.description: Methods for identifying covert operatives and foreign intelligence threats.

cards.title: Behavioral Analysis of Espionage Agents
cards.description: Identifying suspicious behavioral patterns indicative of espionage activity.
bulletpoints: Analyze inconsistencies in cover stories
Identify signs of nervousness or over-prepared responses
Use deception detection techniques in interviews
cards.summaryText: Probe for cover-story gaps, stress cues, and deception markers to flag operatives hiding espionage roles.

cards.title: Analyzing Covert Communications
cards.description: Tracking clandestine messaging techniques used by foreign operatives.
bulletpoints: Monitor use of coded language in digital and verbal exchanges
Identify anomalies in encrypted communication methods
Use metadata analysis to track message transmission points
cards.summaryText: Scrutinize coded phrasing, encryption oddities, and metadata trails to expose clandestine communication chains.

espionage_covert_operations_covert_sabot.name: Covert Sabotage
espionage_covert_operations_covert_sabot.description: Strategies for executing stealth-based disruption operations in high-risk missions.

cards.title: Infrastructure Disruption
cards.description: Tactics for disabling critical systems without detection.
bulletpoints: Use EMP and electronic warfare tools to disable networks
Target key structural weaknesses in industrial facilities
Deploy timed sabotage for optimal operational impact
cards.summaryText: Quietly cripple critical systems via EMP strikes, structural weak points, and precisely timed disruptions.

cards.title: Vehicle Sabotage & Mobility Denial
cards.description: Techniques for neutralizing enemy transportation assets without detection.
bulletpoints: Disable vehicle electronics using advanced disruption tools
Implement slow-acting fuel contamination for long-term disruption
Use remote-triggered tampering for high-profile missions
cards.summaryText: Deny mobility by sabotaging electronics, seeding delayed fuel failures, and remote-triggering tampering when impact peaks.

espionage_covert_operations_escape_and_e.name: Escape & Evasion
espionage_covert_operations_escape_and_e.description: Survival techniques for eluding capture and escaping from hostile environments.

cards.title: Urban Evasion & Disguise
cards.description: Avoiding detection and blending into civilian populations during high-risk escapes.
bulletpoints: Use disguises and quick wardrobe changes to avoid recognition
Navigate urban landscapes while minimizing exposure
Employ decoy tactics to mislead pursuers
cards.summaryText: Cycle disguises, route through low-visibility corridors, and drop decoys to vanish inside dense urban crowds.

cards.title: Wilderness Escape & Survival
cards.description: Tactics for surviving in remote environments while evading trackers.
bulletpoints: Use counter-tracking techniques to confuse pursuers
Source food and water while maintaining a low profile
Employ natural cover and terrain navigation strategies
cards.summaryText: Mask tracks, forage quietly, and ride terrain cover to slip trackers while staying supplied off-grid.

espionage_covert_operations_undercover_r.name: Undercover Roles
espionage_covert_operations_undercover_r.description: Techniques for assuming and maintaining covert identities in high-risk environments.

cards.title: Legend Building & Deep Cover
cards.description: Creating and maintaining a false identity to operate in hostile environments.
bulletpoints: Develop comprehensive backstories and personal narratives
Memorize details of cover identities and supporting documentation
Adapt speech patterns and behaviors to match target demographics
cards.summaryText: Craft airtight legends, internalize every detail, and mirror local mannerisms to survive deep cover deployments.

cards.title: Social Infiltration & Manipulation
cards.description: Gaining access to restricted environments through social engineering techniques.
bulletpoints: Utilize pretexting to gain trust within target organizations
Develop rapport-building techniques for intelligence gathering
Avoid common pitfalls that could compromise undercover roles
cards.summaryText: Blend pretexting with rapid rapport tactics while steering clear of tells that would blow your undercover access.

espionage_disguise_and_identity_costume_.name: Costume and Makeup
espionage_disguise_and_identity_costume_.description: Using disguises, prosthetics, and physical transformation for covert operations.

cards.title: Quick-Change Disguises
cards.description: Methods for rapidly changing appearance in the field.
bulletpoints: Use layered clothing for instant transformations
Employ wigs, hats, and glasses for visual deception
Master movement and posture adjustments to enhance disguise
cards.summaryText: Stack peel-away outfits, swap surface accessories, and tweak body language to pivot identities in seconds.

cards.title: Prosthetic Makeup & Facial Alteration
cards.description: Using prosthetics and special effects makeup to alter facial structure.
bulletpoints: Apply latex prosthetics for enhanced physical disguise
Use shading and contouring techniques to adjust facial features
Simulate aging or ethnic transformation using professional methods
cards.summaryText: Build prosthetic layers with precise shading to reshape features, age profiles, or shift ethnicity convincingly.

espionage_disguise_and_identity_identity.name: Identity Forging
espionage_disguise_and_identity_identity.description: Techniques for creating and maintaining false identities in covert operations.

cards.title: Forged Passports & Legal Documents
cards.description: Creating and acquiring falsified identity documents for deep cover operations.
bulletpoints: Analyze security features in authentic documents
Modify biometric data without raising suspicion
Maintain consistency across multiple identity records
cards.summaryText: Replicate document defenses, tweak biometrics covertly, and sync every record so forged IDs pass scrutiny.

cards.title: Backstory Creation & Legend Maintenance
cards.description: Crafting believable backstories to reinforce covert identities.
bulletpoints: Develop family and work history that aligns with mission parameters
Practice linguistic and cultural assimilation techniques
Ensure digital footprint consistency with assumed identities
cards.summaryText: Engineer mission-fit histories, master cultural fluency, and curate matching digital footprints to keep legends intact.

espionage_disguise_and_identity_social_d.name: Social Deception
espionage_disguise_and_identity_social_d.description: Manipulating social interactions and exploiting psychological weaknesses for identity concealment.

cards.title: Verbal Pretexting & Conversational Manipulation
cards.description: Using deception to extract information and maintain cover identities.
bulletpoints: Develop pretexting scripts for various scenarios
Redirect suspicion through controlled conversational pivots
Employ linguistic cues to reinforce assumed backgrounds
cards.summaryText: Script flexible pretexts, steer dialogue away from risk, and lace speech with cues that sustain your cover story.

cards.title: Body Language Control & Psychological Projection
cards.description: Mastering nonverbal cues to enhance deception and believability.
bulletpoints: Adjust posture and gait to match identity roles
Control microexpressions to avoid unintended signals
Use mirroring techniques to build trust with targets
cards.summaryText: Modulate stance, microexpressions, and mirroring to project the persona convincingly and calm scrutiny.

espionage_psychological_manipulation_coe.name: Coercion Methods
espionage_psychological_manipulation_coe.description: Psychological pressure tactics for gaining compliance in intelligence operations.

cards.title: Fear Induction and Compliance Strategies
cards.description: Using psychological pressure to control behavior.
bulletpoints: Leverage uncertainty to create psychological distress
Use selective reinforcement to condition responses
Employ time pressure to force rapid decision-making
cards.summaryText: Spike uncertainty, reward compliance, and compress decision windows to steer targets into obedience.

cards.title: Manipulating Confessions and Testimony
cards.description: Techniques for extracting information through psychological leverage.
bulletpoints: Use guilt and moral framing to elicit voluntary confessions
Introduce false evidence to create internal doubt
Employ strategic pauses and silence to induce discomfort
cards.summaryText: Layer guilt cues, staged evidence, and silence to unravel resistance and draw out admissions.

espionage_psychological_manipulation_emo.name: Emotional Exploitation
espionage_psychological_manipulation_emo.description: Leveraging human emotions to manipulate thoughts, behaviors, and alliances.

cards.title: Guilt and Obligation Exploitation
cards.description: Manipulating moral and ethical principles to control behavior.
bulletpoints: Use emotional reciprocity to create a sense of obligation
Exploit unresolved personal conflicts for leverage
Frame manipulations within a moral justification framework
cards.summaryText: Trade favors, surface unresolved conflicts, and cloak demands in ethics to bind targets through guilt.

cards.title: Isolation and Dependency Tactics
cards.description: Controlling social environments to increase influence over a target.
bulletpoints: Limit external communication to reinforce dependency
Gradually introduce new belief systems under controlled conditions
Use selective social reinforcement to deepen emotional reliance
cards.summaryText: Cut off outside support, drip-feed ideology, and reward compliance to lock targets in dependent loops.

espionage_psychological_manipulation_per.name: Persuasion and Influence
espionage_psychological_manipulation_per.description: Techniques for controlling narratives and influencing decision-making in intelligence operations.

cards.title: Framing Effect & Narrative Control
cards.description: Shaping how information is presented to influence decision-making.
bulletpoints: Use selective language to guide perception
Implement contrast principles to control emotional responses
Apply cognitive biases to reinforce desired conclusions
cards.summaryText: Reframe narratives with tailored language, contrast hooks, and bias triggers to steer choices.

cards.title: Trust Exploitation and Rapport Building
cards.description: Establishing trust with targets to manipulate behaviors and gain intelligence.
bulletpoints: Identify and mirror psychological vulnerabilities
Use progressive disclosure to deepen trust over time
Control body language and vocal tonality to reinforce credibility
cards.summaryText: Mirror vulnerabilities, release information gradually, and manage tone and posture to convert trust into leverage.

espionage_tradecraft_dead_drop_methods.name: Dead Drop Methods
espionage_tradecraft_dead_drop_methods.description: Techniques for covert information exchange using hidden physical locations.

cards.title: Brush Pass and Live Drops
cards.description: Executing rapid, undetectable exchanges in public settings.
bulletpoints: Use crowd density and movement to mask exchanges
Deploy synchronized gestures and inconspicuous signals
Plan timed encounters to avoid unwanted attention
cards.summaryText: Exploit crowd flow with prearranged cues and tight timing so live drops vanish in plain sight.

cards.title: Container Concealment and Dead Drop Locations
cards.description: Hiding sensitive materials in secure yet accessible locations.
bulletpoints: Use magnetic compartments and false-bottom containers
Identify high-traffic but low-security dead drop locations
Develop retrieval and monitoring strategies to avoid detection
cards.summaryText: Cache materials in disguised containers at busy-yet-unwatched spots and schedule stealthy retrieval sweeps.

espionage_tradecraft_encryption_and_decr.name: Encryption and Decryption
espionage_tradecraft_encryption_and_decr.description: Techniques for encoding and decoding sensitive intelligence communications.

cards.title: Cipher Analysis and Code Breaking
cards.description: Understanding and cracking cryptographic ciphers used in intelligence operations.
bulletpoints: Identify common cipher algorithms (Caesar, Vigenère, RSA, AES)
Use frequency analysis to break substitution ciphers
Apply modern decryption techniques with computational tools
cards.summaryText: Catalog classic-to-modern ciphers, exploit frequency patterns, and wield compute to tear through codes.

cards.title: Steganography and Hidden Data Transmission
cards.description: Embedding covert messages in digital media for secure transmission.
bulletpoints: Use image, audio, and text-based steganographic techniques
Detect and decode hidden messages within digital content
Implement steganographic payloads with advanced cryptography
cards.summaryText: Hide intel inside media streams, sniff out embedded payloads, and pair concealment with strong crypto.

espionage_tradecraft_secure_messaging.name: Secure Messaging
espionage_tradecraft_secure_messaging.description: Ensuring confidentiality and integrity in intelligence communications.

cards.title: One-Time Pads and Unbreakable Encryption
cards.description: Using disposable encryption keys for ultra-secure communication.
bulletpoints: Understand the principles of perfect secrecy
Generate and distribute one-time pad keys securely
Apply OTP encryption and decryption techniques manually
cards.summaryText: Pair perfectly random pads with disciplined key handling to keep messages mathematically unbreakable.

cards.title: Burner Devices and Secure Channels
cards.description: Using disposable communication methods to avoid tracking and interception.
bulletpoints: Select secure devices and operating systems
Deploy encrypted messaging platforms (Signal, Tails OS, ProtonMail)
Implement compartmentalization techniques to protect identity
cards.summaryText: Cycle hardened burner hardware, encrypted apps, and strict compartmentalization to dodge surveillance.
